TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[518.200-550.560] interviewee: there you will be doing your duty.
[550.560-620.983] interviewee: For last six months, I didn't do any exercises. And I went in the morning dressed up to the pharmacy. They couldn't transfer me permanently there. But I had to go by streetcar. This was up to the end. This was the last six months. So I got away with it. After serving in the army the two years, I went to the university in Krakow to pharmacy school. And I was there for three years.

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: For last six months, I didn't do any exercises. And I went in the morning dressed up to the pharmacy. They couldn't transfer me permanently there. But I had to go by streetcar. This was up to the end. This was the last six months. So I got away with it. After serving in the army the two years, I went to the university in Krakow to pharmacy school. And I was there for three years.
